title: Breathe Freedom: the John McNeil story
original_title: Breathe Freedom: the John McNeil story
overview: John McNeil's life turns upside down when he's unexpectedly arrested for a self-defense incident that occurred months earlier. Despite initial police clearance, he faces a harrowing journey through the justice system.
